supersedes.reason: 13-slot v5.1 with pauldrons. User decided to drop pauldrons and add ring_3 instead — fresh publish needed because Item type enum changed (PAULDRONS=12 removed) and a new equip primitive (equip_ring_3 / unequip_ring_3) was added.
Original 10-slot v5.1 from the overnight run.

slots._comment: 13-slot loadout (final). pauldrons REMOVED; ring_3 added. Total slot count matches the original v5.1 plan.

rarity_stat_budgets._comment: Sum of all *_bonus fields + max_damage capped per rarity in mint_item_admin.

v5_2_deferred: Confirm-modal gate for every signAndExecuteTransaction (MAINNET_PREP §D HARD blocker)
WS message Zod validation + rate-limiter middleware
Frontend Draw modal + W/L/D counter render
Empty catch sweep + StatBonuses shape unification

mint_instructions._comment: How to mint items into TREASURY then transfer to a player wallet. The frontend supports drag-equip/inventory-pick across all 13 slots once items are in the player's wallet.
mint_instructions.mint_item_admin_signature: mint_item_admin(admin_cap, name, image_url, item_type, class_req, level_req, rarity, slot_type, str_bonus, dex_bonus, int_bonus, end_bonus, hp_bonus, armor_bonus, defense_bonus, attack_bonus, crit_chance_bonus, crit_multiplier_bonus, evasion_bonus, anti_crit_bonus, anti_evasion_bonus, min_damage, max_damage, ctx)

slot_type_rules.everything_else: Must be 0 (mainhand) by convention — armor slots are determined by item_type alone, slot_type is a no-op for them but must be zero per validator.

mint_instructions.rarity_budget: Sum of all *_bonus fields + max_damage must be ≤ rarity budget. mint_item_admin aborts with ERarityBudgetExceeded (code 5) if exceeded.
mint_instructions.example_mint_script: See scripts/mint-v5.1-13slot-catalog.ts in the repo — illustrates the full mint+transfer pattern with retry-on-version-race. Adjust item specs + recipient wallet, then run with the v5.1 SUI_PACKAGE_ID and ADMIN_CAP_ID env vars.
